hooks.command: echo 'QUIRKY ANTI-SLOP ACTIVE. On prose (.md/.txt/.mdx/.rst): cut AI cliches (furthermore, moreover, leverage, utilize, facilitate, robust, seamless, cutting-edge, state-of-the-art). No em/en dashes or ellipses. Prefer contractions. Strip hedges and fillers. Fix slop, do not pad. Never change code, commands, or numbers. Use quirky_score_text then quirky_fix_text when available.'
uv run --with quirky python -m quirky.hooks.check --event post-tool-use
uv run --with quirky python -m quirky.hooks.check --event stop
